inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User's body weight in kilograms. Used to compute energy expenditure.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent jumping rope in minutes.

inputs.label: Jumps per Minute
inputs.businessContext: Average number of rope skips per minute. Influences intensity (MET).

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Individual fitness variation multiplier (1.0 = average, >1 = higher calorie burn).
